title: Getting error on installation
body:
i was getting below error when ever i give command of sudo make install

```
making verilator in src
make -C src 
make[1]: Entering directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src'
make -C obj_dbg -j 1  TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj serial
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make[2]: Nothing to be done for 'serial'.
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make -C obj_dbg       TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 -f ../Makefile_obj
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
      Compile flags:  g++ -Og -ggdb -gz -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -DVERILATOR_INTERNAL_ -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-free -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/build/share/verilator"
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make -C obj_dbg       TGT=../../bin/verilator_coverage_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 VL_VLCOV=1 -f ../Makefile_obj serial_vlcov
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make[2]: Nothing to be done for 'serial_vlcov'.
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make -C obj_dbg       TGT=../../bin/verilator_coverage_bin_dbg VL_DEBUG=1 VL_VLCOV=1 -f ../Makefile_obj
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
      Compile flags:  g++ -Og -ggdb -gz -DVL_DEBUG -D_GLIBCXX_DEBUG -DVERILATOR_INTERNAL_ -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-free -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/build/share/verilator"
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_dbg'
make -C obj_opt -j 1  TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin -f ../Makefile_obj serial
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_opt'
make[2]: Nothing to be done for 'serial'.
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_opt'
make -C obj_opt       TGT=../../bin/verilator_bin -f ../Makefile_obj
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_opt'
      Compile flags:  g++ -O3 -DVERILATOR_INTERNAL_ -MMD -I. -I.. -I.. -I../../include -I../../include -MP -faligned-new -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-shadow -fno-builtin-malloc -fno-builtin-calloc -fno-builtin-realloc -fno-builtin-free -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_ARCH="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_INCLUDE="" -DDEFENV_SYSTEMC_LIBDIR="" -DDEFENV_VERILATOR_ROOT="/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/build/share/verilator"
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src/obj_opt'
make[1]: Leaving directory '/home/roshit/Tools/verilator/src'
help2man --no-info --no-discard-stderr --version-string=- bin/verilator_gantt -o verilator_gantt.1
make: help2man: Command not found
Makefile:191: recipe for target 'verilator_gantt.1' failed
make: *** [verilator_gantt.1] Error 127

```

can anyone help to resolve this problem
